overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark rural area at night, illuminated by torchlight. The character crosses a wooden footbridge and passes a stationary horse before continuing into a dense forest path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path illuminated by torchlight, approaching a wooden bridge

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with tire tracks and scattered stones
green leafy bushes lining the left side of the path
rustic wooden post fence running along the right side
wooden logs and branches scattered across the path surface
makeshift wooden plank structure beside the fence
yellow diamond-shaped caution sign on a wooden post

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path bordered by wooden fences and vegetation, illuminated by warm torchlight in the darkness. Scattered logs and a warning sign appear along the route as the character approaches a bridge.

events.description: character steps onto wooden footbridge, hand holding torch becomes visible in frame
character looks down over bridge railing at water below

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing wooden bridge while holding torch, briefly looking down at the water

entered.detail: rustic wooden plank bridge with visible gaps between boards
thick rope handrails tied to wooden posts along bridge sides
dark water visible below the bridge when looking down

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a narrow wooden footbridge with rope railings, crossing over dark water. The hand holding the torch is now visible as the character walks carefully across the planks and briefly looks down at the water below.

events.description: character passes the stationary horse on the left side

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a stationary horse standing in the middle of the path

notable_agents.action: horse standing still on path wearing red blanket, facing the camera with reflective eyes

entered.detail: scattered stones and rocks along the path edges

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the character encounters a stationary horse wearing a red blanket standing in the middle of the path. The character passes the horse on the left and continues along the rocky dirt trail.

agents.ego_description: continuing along winding forest path surrounded by dense trees

entered.detail: tall pine and deciduous trees lining both sides of the path
dense forest trees creating a canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along a winding dirt path through a dense forest, with tall trees lining both sides of the trail. The vegetation becomes thicker as the path progresses deeper into the wooded area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a fenced rural path through a bridge crossing and into the depths of a dense forest. It begins along a narrow dirt trail bordered by wooden fences and scattered logs, where warm torchlight cuts through the darkness to reveal a warning sign. As the path ends, the camera moves onto a narrow wooden footbridge with rope railings, momentarily glancing down at the dark water below while the torch-bearing hand becomes visible. The scene then shifts back to solid ground as the character passes a stationary horse draped in a red blanket, continuing along a rocky trail. Finally, the environment closes in as the path winds deeper into a thick wooded area, with tall trees and dense vegetation lining both sides of the route.
